title: dortmanna polyphylla
intro: Dortmanna polyphylla, also known as the American wintergreen, is a perennial plant belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). The leaves of this plant contain methyl salicylate, a compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which makes it a valuable medicinal plant. The health benefits of Dortmanna polyphylla include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved digestive health, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna polyphylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore muscles, calm digestive issues, and alleviate headaches.
